mapper.sql: id, s_warehouse_code, modelno, quantity, salsesInfoNo, dept_no, expdate, warehouse_code, statecode, msg, inserttime, customerNo
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.salesinfo
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into dbo.salesinfo
id,
s_warehouse_code,
modelno,
quantity,
salsesInfoNo,
dept_no,
expdate,
warehouse_code,
statecode,
msg,
inserttime,
customerNo,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{salsesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{expdate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.salesinfo
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
s_warehouse_code = #{record.sWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
salsesInfoNo = #{record.salsesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_no = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expdate = #{record.expdate,jdbcType=DATE},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
statecode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
msg = #{record.msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inserttime = #{record.inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.salesinfo set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, s_warehouse_code = #{record.sWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, salsesInfoNo = #{record.salsesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_no = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expdate = #{record.expdate,jdbcType=DATE}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, statecode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, msg = #{record.msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, inserttime = #{record.inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.salesinfo
s_warehouse_code = #{sWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
salsesInfoNo = #{salsesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_no = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expdate = #{expdate,jdbcType=DATE},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
statecode = #{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
msg = #{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inserttime = #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.salesinfo set s_warehouse_code = #{sWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, salsesInfoNo = #{salsesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_no = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expdate = #{expdate,jdbcType=DATE}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, statecode = #{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, msg = #{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, inserttime = #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, customerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
